agreement_name: Framework Agreement - Judicial & Legal Studies Institute (JLSI)
agreement_summary: Framework Agreement between the University of Bahrain and the Judicial & Legal Studies Institute to strengthen cooperation in legal education, training and research. Key provisions include exchanging scientific and practical expertise, coordinating joint scientific and training programmes, exchanging information and reports, using digital databases and library services, engaging UoB faculty and specialists in legal training and committees, and giving UoB affiliates priority to participate in training, workshops, seminars and legal lectures.
focus_area: Legal Education; Training; Scientific Research; Professional Development; Legal Awareness; Community Partnership
agreement_signing_link: Not found on UOB website after search

faculty_exchanged: UoB faculty/specialists may participate in training programmes and committees; no number specified

agreement_name: MOU - King Faisal Center for Research and Islamic Studies
partner_entity: King Faisal Center for Research and Islamic Studies
owner_entity: Vice President for Partnerships and Development
agreement_summary: MOU between the University of Bahrain and King Faisal Center for Research and Islamic Studies to activate research and cultural cooperation. Key provisions include joint research cooperation, organizing lectures/courses/workshops, participation in scientific activities and events, supporting publication in research related to UNESCO Chair for Translating Cultures, academic and expert exchange through the Chair programme and translation laboratory, publishing selected theses granted by the Center, and encouraging UoB students and researchers to engage with KFCRIS activities.
focus_area: Research Collaboration; Islamic Studies; Cultural Translation; Publications; Academic Events; UNESCO Chair
students_exchanged: Student participation in cooperation activities mentioned; no number specified
faculty_exchanged: Exchange of academics, specialists and experts mentioned; no number specified

agreement_name: MOU - Colorado School of Mines
agreement_summary: MOU between the University of Bahrain and Colorado School of Mines to establish collaboration in academic and research development. Key provisions include faculty and curriculum development, collaborative research, teaching and research infrastructure development, joint research in petroleum engineering and exploration, CO2 management and nuclear engineering, executive education for science and engineering professionals, exchange of faculty and students, cooperative professional master's degrees, 2+2 and 2+2+1 cooperative degree pathways, and specific initial projects with Bapco Upstream and nuclear engineering capacity building.
focus_area: Engineering; Petroleum Engineering; CO2 Management; Nuclear Engineering; Research Collaboration; Faculty and Student Exchange; Joint Degrees
students_exchanged: Exchange of undergraduate and graduate students mentioned; no number specified
faculty_exchanged: Exchange of professors and academic colleagues mentioned; no number specified
joint_programs: Potential cooperative Professional Master's, 2+2 and 2+2+1 cooperative degrees mentioned; no finalized number stated

agreement_name: Framework Agreement - Customs Affairs at the Ministry of Interior
agreement_type: Framework Agreement / Training and Consultancy Cooperation
owner_entity: Community Service and Continuing Education Center
agreement_summary: Framework Agreement between the University of Bahrain and Customs Affairs at the Ministry of Interior to develop training programmes, performance efficiency and service quality. Key provisions include training in leadership, rights and duties under the law, operational plans, documenting government practices, public speaking and report writing, exchanging expertise, providing UoB academic cadres for training and advisory services, designing training packages, providing shared training programmes and qualified trainers, offering training rooms, awareness programmes, internships for UoB students, and follow-up through periodic review and reporting.
focus_area: Training; Consultancy; Customs; Public Sector Capacity Building; Professional Development; Student Training
students_exchanged: Practical training for UoB students mentioned; no number specified
faculty_exchanged: UoB academic staff/cadres may participate in training and advisory services; no number specified
joint_programs: Joint training programmes and consultancy activities to be implemented through agreement; no specific programme number stated

agreement_name: MOU - Gulf Petrochemicals and Chemicals Association (GPCA)
agreement_summary: MOU between the University of Bahrain and Gulf Petrochemicals and Chemicals Association (GPCA) to promote academic, research and awareness collaboration and sustainable partnership. Key provisions include UoB participation in GPCA conferences, forums, seminars and workshops; GPCA access to self-learning activities such as online workshops, toolkits, webinars and newsletters; opportunities to participate in GPCA awards and initiatives; in-person industry awareness workshops for STEM students; cooperation in academic and research programmes including sustainability, capability building and community outreach; and a kick-off meeting to agree roles and responsibilities.
focus_area: Petrochemicals; Chemicals Industry; Sustainability; STEM Awareness; Capability Building; Industry Collaboration
students_exchanged: STEM students may participate in awareness workshops; no exchange number specified
faculty_exchanged: Not specified
joint_programs: Academic and research programmes, sustainability, capability building and community outreach mentioned; no specific programme number stated

agreement_name: Small-Scale Funding Agreement - UNEP / GEF Minamata Convention Initial Assessment (MIA) for the Kingdom of Bahrain
agreement_summary: Small-Scale Funding Agreement between the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP) and the University of Bahrain as Executing Agency for the GEF Enabling Activity project: Development of Minamata Convention Initial Assessment (MIA) for the Kingdom of Bahrain. The project aims to facilitate early implementation of the Minamata Convention through scientific and technical knowledge and tools for national stakeholders in Bahrain. Key provisions include UOB project implementation duties, reporting and financial reporting to UNEP, stakeholder coordination, UNEP oversight and technical support, and use of UNEP/GEF funds for approved project activities.
focus_area: Environmental Governance; Minamata Convention; Chemicals and Waste; Mercury Management; Scientific and Technical Knowledge; GEF Enabling Activity; Sustainability
students_exchanged: Not specified
faculty_exchanged: Not specified
joint_programs: Project implementation and technical cooperation activities; no joint academic programme number specified
